reviews.author: movie fans
reviews.review_body:
WORST SCHOOL EVER!!!
i personally am a ges student and i have never seen such kind of
partiality the teachers show towards some "selective" students The teachers do not give all students equal opportunities
They stick to a few students and select them for all events without understanding the talent other people have and make it up in a way that it was agreed by all
The teachers are not promoting children to showcase their tallent and show a lot of partiality.
The child feels a lot inferior when it comes to some points as they are not getting equal opportunities too.
I would like to ask the school how would you find the talent in all students when you guys dont give equal opportunities too all SCHOOL NOT RECOMENDED AT ALL!

reviews.author: Raju sports
reviews.review_body: Good morning global edge school of. ,The most important day of a person’s education is the first day of school, not Graduation Day.”

reviews.author: Angeleena Jasmine
reviews.review_body:
I'm an Ex Student of GES, I spent 5 precious years of my life in this School, I genuinely like to call this my Second Home. This is the best school I have ever been in, the management including Studies, activities, functions are excellent. The teachers are very good, they teach every concept properly with activities and everything is understandable. They take proper care of students. The Language education is quite Good, especially English (Which is also the medium of instruction) is taught quite well. This school, Unlike other schools, teaches you discipline, Honesty and empathy apart from academics. It teaches you to be a good human-being in this world full of cut-throat competition and insensitivity.
The facilities and infrastructure are Good too!
People ranking it low must introspect and review their mindsets because Global edge school is not the run-of-the-mill show-off school. Study here and you will reminiscence the time spent here for life.
If I could go back in time I'll relieve every moment that I experienced in this school from 2016-2021.

reviews.author: Narendra G
reviews.review_body: The very very typical  commercial school. Too much fee with very few activities in the school. Minimum of Ten percent increment every year on the next standard without any hesitation. No outdoor activities except 1 or 2 trips planned by school for which you will be asked to pay the money some times.   They want parents to teach the subject. They are only bothered about merit students.  I personally felt, my kid is learning very less from class room than the personally Tution arranged. Kid to kid in the same class school fee varies. To conclude, this school is not worth of paying too much money for the fee considering the education and extra activities. Think ten times , before you join your kid here.
